description: AInchors Service Ticket Log. Every ad-hoc request, task, or action without an existing INC/US/CHG reference MUST have a TKT number before work begins.

tickets.notes: Aria live as Business Stream Lead

tickets.title: Governance layer: Security + Legal + QA agents — operational for Aria/Angie work
tickets.description: Stand up 3 cross-stream governance agents (Security 🔐, Legal ⚖️, QA 🧪). All Aria external-facing work routes through governance before execution. Immediate priority — Angie is active on Aria now.

tickets.title: Warden agent — model governance and compliance
tickets.description: Build Warden 🔍 as dedicated model compliance agent in governance layer. Monitors all agents (technical + business streams) for model drift, validates against critical-config-baseline, maintains audit log, escalates violations to Yoda for remediation.

tickets.title: US35: Haiku 4.5 as Tier 2 — sub-task routing implementation
tickets.description: Implement Claude Haiku 4.5 as Tier 2 model in the 3-tier strategy. Route governance reviews, health checks, Warden checks, and bounded sub-tasks to Haiku (3x cheaper than Sonnet). Ken approved 2026-04-28.

tickets.title: Day 4 Sprint — shadow logging, US22, config-009, burn alert
tickets.description: 4 items from 9AM model review report: (1) fix gemma4 shadow logging, (2) US22 cost tracker, (3) config-009 Aria modelFallbacks, (4) daily burn alert at $40 USD

tickets.title: Sage Rule 1: QA gate on all shared/communicated assets
tickets.description: Non-negotiable. All generated assets for sharing or external comms must pass Sage QA before delivery. All agents, both streams. No exceptions.

tickets.title: Shield Rule 1 + Lex Rule 1: security and legal assurance gates on all shared assets
tickets.description: Non-negotiable. Mirror Sage Rule 1 for Shield (security) and Lex (legal). All generated assets for sharing must pass all three governance checks before delivery. Applies to all agents, both streams.

tickets.title: US23: Resilient outage handling — execution sprint
tickets.description: Execute US23: auto-detect billing/auth failures, validate fallback chain on boot + first failure, standby mode with banner, recovery automation.
tickets.notes: US23 delivered: outage-handler.sh, validate-fallback-chain.sh updated (Haiku+e2b checks), health-check wired, hourly cron, standby banner, HEARTBEAT. CHG-0058.

tickets.title: Priority 2-4 sprint: ITSM batch, model strategy blog, US27 diagnostics
tickets.description: Execute: QW-2 (severity flag), QW-3 (Standards.md), ITSM-US-007 (auto-heal INC), ITSM-US-006 (PIR trigger), Model Strategy Blog Post, US27 phases 7-9.

tickets.title: Business ROI framework — value definition, tracking, Aria implementation
tickets.description: Build business stream equivalent of tech cost/ROI framework. Value categories: revenue pipeline, content/brand, time efficiency, risk/compliance, client value. Aria maintains and reports. Canvas dashboard. Feeds into future business value and ROI reporting.

tickets.title: Business ROI expansion: campaign tracking, marketing funnel, sales conversion
tickets.description: Expand business ROI framework with: campaign/program/initiative cost+work tracking, post-execution metrics (reach/impressions/revenue/conversion), marketing funnel metrics, sales conversion framework. Aria implements and prompts for metrics post-execution.

tickets.title: Fix Aria fallback chain - prohibited models in defaults
tickets.description: Aria (business agent) inherits defaults fallback [Opus, Gemma4:26b] — both prohibited per model-policy.json. Change defaults.model.fallbacks to [Haiku] only. Opus is deliberate escalation only, not automatic fallback. Update validate-fallback-chain.sh, model-policy.json, cost state to USD91.17.
tickets.resolution: CHG-0075 complete. defaults.model.fallbacks changed to [haiku-4-5]. Warden updated. 9/9 PASS. Gateway restarted.

tickets.title: US20: Research Framework — define Tiers 2-4, /research routing, registry, Notion AKB
tickets.description: Ken approved 2026-04-29 18:05 AEST. T2=Sonnet 1-2hr, T3=Sonnet 15-30min, T4=Haiku 5min. /research routes by tier. Output registry. Notion AKB new Research section.
tickets.resolution: US20 complete. T2/T3/T4 defined. /research routing live. Registry + Notion Research Log created. CHG-0079.
